programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E58 - Birthday Party'. The twins have a party to celebrate their fifth birthdays, and mummy and daddy buy them the best present ever.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Go Jetter Heroes: Amelia Earhart'. Inspired by her hero Amelia Earhart, Xuli attempts a solo flight across the Atlantic Ocean in a vintage plane.

programme.title: Waffle The Wonder Dog
programme.desc: 'S2/E30 - Waffle Steals The Show'. It's the school show, and Doug, Ali and Mrs Hobbs are performing. Evie gets locked in the toilet, but Waffle saves the day in time to sing his line in the finale and surprise everyone!

programme.title: Catie's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Building Machines'. Catie tests out three amazing machines that all help people build things: a bulldozer, an incredible tunnel-boring machine and a digger.

programme.title: Show Me Show Me
programme.desc: 'S6/E13 - Winding and Hands'. Children's fun with Chris and Pui, who pretend to be wind up toys and turn their hands into dinosaurs.

programme.title: Show Me Show Me
programme.desc: 'S5/E14 - Caves and Treasure'. Miss Mouse is busy being a brave cave explorer, and she becomes the granter of everybody's wishes.

programme.title: Woolly & Tig
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Waiting'. Tig bakes a cake but gets frustrated when she has to wait for it to cook.

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Star Flower'. Small Clanger is fishing in the music boat and catches a beautiful silver seed. Mother and Tiny help him to plant it and it grows into a very shy little plant.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S13/E20 - Trikes'. The Teletubbies watch children have fun riding their trikes. Po is riding her scooter.

programme.title: In The Night Garden
programme.desc: 'S1/E35 - The Pontipines Find Igglepiggle's Blanket'. Enter a magical world halfway between waking and sleeping. Igglepiggle is dancing in the garden when he loses his blanket. Will he find it?

programme.title: Apple Tree House
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Terrible Twos'. Mali's not wrong when he assumes that he's missing out on playdates because of his disruptive little sister Yasmeen!

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Yo-yo'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'yo-yo' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see a stripy yo-yo, some spotty yo-yos, a flashy yo-yo and even a peepo yo-yo!

programme.title: Nina And The Neurons: Get Sporty
programme.desc: 'S9/E3 - Football'. Nina shows how footballers plan to cover the whole pitch and does an experiment to discover why the goalkeeper is an important member of the team.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Bird'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'bird' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of different birds including a swimming bird, a napping bird and even a rapping bird!

programme.title: Andy's Top Five
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Andy reveals his favourite epic chases, filled with adventure and fun facts!

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animals
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Bedtime'. Andy Day takes a look at young animals as they learn how to make a place to rest. In Tibet, bar-headed geese make a soft nest out of feathers.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Fleeced'. The Farmer decides it's time to give the flock a shearing. But when they see his first attempt, Shaun and co. plan their escape.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: 'S23/E1'. Bulgy thinks that people should travel by bus instead of rail, that is until he tries carrying all their passengers.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - 1/2'. Postman Pat and his faithful cat Jess have joined the Special Delivery Service - they must deliver anything, anytime, anywhere.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - The Case of the Runaway Train'. Noddy investigates when the train leaves the station without any of the passengers on board.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E31 - New House'. The twins explore their new house which they like, but wish was more homely.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Hat'. This episode has fun with '-ap' and the words hat, fan, pet, bat, zap, yap and tap.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - Little Read N'. This episode has fun with the words dog, dig, cat, cut, pig, pick, mill, mix, hot and ten.

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue
programme.desc: 'S1/E16'. Dad & Rio are at the play park today. Dad shows Rio how to play hopscotch. Rio skips some of the numbers as she hops from 0 to 10 quickly.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S5/E10'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'star', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of stars - a yellow star, a bright one, a pointy star and a jingle star.

programme.title: Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest
programme.desc: 'S1/E15'. Join Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers on an eco quest to discover one of nature's wonders and the important role it plays in our environment.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: 'S24/E2'. When Thomas discovers a missing dog rummaging around the railway yard, he tries to find the dog a new home.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Shops'. Playing 'Shops' is the best game ever for Bluey and her friends - if they can ever get started! With Bluey questioning the rules and changing who's who, they might be here all day!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Wagon Ride'. Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: 'S3/E34 - The Comic Badge'. Duggee is reading the Squirrels one of his favourite comics. They eagerly want to know the ending, but the comic was discontinued. Luckily Duggee has the comic badge!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E25 - Postman Pat and The Pop Star Rescue'. Pat's got an extra special delivery today - an actual pop star!

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E70 - All Change!'. It's three months later and the start of the summer holidays.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S6/E13 - Slime v Slop'. Captain Hey Ho instructs Cook and Line to find out which is more useful: slime or slop. The boys are happy to get to work and set up some experiments to put both substances to the test.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E37 - The Monkey That Roared'. Every time Raa Raa visits a friend, there's a loud roar. It's not Raa Raa, so who could it be?

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Jaybird'. J wants to sing and fly like a jolly jaybird - can A and friends help? This episode has fun with the words jam, jar and jay.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: 'S3/E28 - The Big One'. One Hundred shows us what she's made of in a big song about being big.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: 'S2/E24'. The delightful and heart-warming animated series celebrating the special relationship between an inquisitive girl and her vibrant grandmother is back.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E107 - Straws'. Big straws appear in Teletubbyland and Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po wonder what to do with them. The Teletubbies blow through the straws to make colourful bubbles.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E108 - Bunny Rabbits'. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po watch bunny rabbits. Bunny ears and tails appear on the Teletubbies. They do the 'bunny hop hop' before saying 'eh oh' to the Tiddlytubbies.

programme.title: Tik Tak
programme.desc: 'S1/E24'. Explore a dissection puzzle of a pink cupboard, a textile ski lift and watch as Book Girl does some painting.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E50 - Shaun'. Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble.

programme.title: Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest
programme.desc: 'S1/E17'. Join Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers on an eco quest to discover one of nature's wonders and the important role it plays in our environment.

programme.title: Waffle The Wonder Dog
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - PE Waffle'. Evie forgets her reading book, so Waffle takes it to her at school. As Waffle reaches the playground, he sees Evie's PE class and is desperate to join in.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E47 - Neighbours'. Bluey needs her Mum's advice on dealing with a troublesome neighbour, when the serenity of her couch cushion playhouse is threatened by Bingo's own growing stable of animals.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E48 - Teasing'. Bluey, Bingo and Mum get into a debate with Dad about the definition of teasing. As they recall all the times where he's been a Big Teaser, Dad argues that he was only just playing.

programme.title: Mister Maker Comes To Town
programme.desc: 'S2/E24 - Party Bag Arty Animals'. Find out how to turn party bags into arty animals and see how to make paper plate fruit in less than a minute.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: 'S3/E34 - The Comic Badge'. Duggee is reading the Squirrels one of his favourite comics. They eagerly want to know the ending, but the comic was discontinued. Luckily Duggee has the comic badge!

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Shops'. Jayden has set up a shop in his bedroom with items to buy on the table and a till with coins inside it. But when Papa starts asking how much things cost, Jayden isn't sure.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E66 - Tony's Friend'. Tim arrives at Tony Welch's house for a playdate.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - The Case of Revs Not Listening'. Noddy is looking forward to his first ever go at driving Train, but Revs is playing up and ignoring him, even when Noddy asks him to stop.

programme.title: Dog Loves Books
programme.desc: 'S1/E38 - Dog Loves Don Quixote'. Pug needs a story about how to be brave. Dog and Pug meet the great Spanish knight Don Quixote and his partner Sancho Panza. Pug needs saving and Don Quixote defeats the giant windmills.

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S5/E12 - Silly As Slop'. Captain Captain thinks Line is as 'silly as a bucket of slop'.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Bonneville Salt Flats, USA'. Xuli and Glitch go head to head as they try to beat the Go Jet Academy land speed record.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - It's Time to Play Basketball'. JoJo and Gran Gran run into Jared and Cynthia who are playing basketball. JoJo joins in, but she doesn't feel like she is tall enough to play it well.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E50 - Kings And Queens Of The Jungle'. Topsy takes a game of Kings and Queens too seriously and starts to boss the other animals around.

programme.title: Mister Maker Comes To Town
programme.desc: 'S2/E25 - Old Shoelace Picture'. Mister Maker visits a Mini Maker and reveals how to make a picture out of old shoelaces. Also, some lucky children take a trip to ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Murder In The Snow'. The story of the random killing of Traci Hammerberg, how the perpetrator evaded detection for decades and how his identity was eventually uncovered by the Bloodline Detectives.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Drug Dealing Doctor'. The small city of Russellville, Ark., normally experiences very few drug overdose deaths a year, but in the year 2000, that number begins to skyrocket.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - The Murder Of Geeta Aulakh'. When Geeta Aulakh was fatally attacked on the way to pick up her children, Detectives tried to find a motive. The case took a new direction after an informant came forward.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The Professor's End'. Kelly and Tonya Rider investigate the strange death of a retired college professor in Tonya's home town, whose cremation was halted by an anonymous tip call, hinting at murder.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Holding Onto Hope'. Kelly and Johnny Bonds return to their home state of Texas to look into the disappearance of a young mother in 2000, whose family has never given up on her.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Sheila LaBarre'. Sheila Labarre invites men to her New Hampshire farm, where she abuses and murders them, leaving behind grieving families.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Drug Dealing Doctor'. The small city of Russellville, Ark., normally experiences very few drug overdose deaths a year, but in the year 2000, that number begins to skyrocket.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Steve Wright'. Steve Wright killed five women , all of whom had been working as prostitutes, over a six week period, without motive or explanation.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Peter Sutcliffe'. Peter Sutcliffe, aka The Yorkshire Ripper, was convicted of killing thirteen women and attempting seven more. He claimed the voice of God told him to kill prostitutes.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Ian Huntley'. Ian Huntley abducted and murdered schoolgirls Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman, attempting to burn their bodies, then pretending to help the Police in their search.

programme.title: License To Kill

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S2/E45 - The Snow Cave/ Good Dino'. Bill, Mazu and Rocky head to the Frozen Land in search of a snow cave just as a blizzard comes. Tiny wants to create a statue of Cretacia's Greatest Hero out of a big boulder.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S2/E46 - The Time Capsule/ Marsh O Saurus'. When Rugo accidentally unearths a time capsule Ayati made with her friend 100 years ago, the four little dinos decide they want to make one too! Marsh wants to be like Giganto!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus

programme.title: Gigantosaurus

programme.desc: A young girl inhabits an isolated island with her scientific father and communicates with a reclusive author of the novel she's reading.

programme.title: Boyz N The Hood
programme.desc: Three childhood friends try to cope with the distractions and dangers of growing up in South Central Los Angeles.

programme.title: Spring Breakers
programme.desc: Four college girls hold up a restaurant in order to fund their spring break vacation. While out partying, they are arrested only to be bailed out by a drug and arms dealer.

programme.title: The Christmas Pageant
programme.desc: When an overly intense and demanding Broadway director gets fired from yet another job, she is forced to take a gig and direct a small-town Christmas pageant

programme.desc: Two women with abusive men in their pasts consider murder as an option to help settle each other's problems.

programme.desc: Meditation in God's Word is a visit with God. Develop your time in God's presence as Prophet TB Joshua reveals how The Word becomes a part of you by meditation.

programme.title: Testimony Time
programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.title: Another Ministry: Abuja

programme.title: Impossible Engineering

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying For Love
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Family Matters'. When a teen boy falls in love with a single teen mum, his very strict parents send him abroad. But, he'll stop at nothing to be reunited with the girl he loves.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying For Love

programme.title: Web Of Lies
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Internet Casanova'. Single mum Jenn thinks she's found the man of her dreams on a dating site, but little does she know Ray Holycross is a sociopath who preys on vulnerable women.

programme.title: Web Of Lies

programme.title: My Zambian Plate

programme.title: Battle Of The Ankara
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. To get a closer look at how the designers bring their ideas to life in the workroom, judge Palesa takes over from Loot in this week's episode.

programme.title: Room Reno
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. A team of experts help two frustrated housemates take on a room revamp. A coin toss decides which housemate will be in charge of the job.

programme.title: Room Reno
programme.desc: 'S2/E5'. Emma and Kwena both claim to be incredibly creative and they're evidently very competitive too. One thing they do agree on is that their living area needs some personality.

programme.title: Will He Say Yes?: Zambia
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. Monica has only been with John for a few months, but she says she can't wait any longer. She is ready to propose to John.

programme.title: Wedding Insider

programme.desc: 'S2/E14'. Alex is devastated. His family is moving. He will have to leave his school, his friends and girlfriend behind. He auditions for a talent show hoping to change their minds.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Alex is crushed. Emma already has a boyfriend. Nicole tries to console him but she's sad, too: she's in love with him. In the meantime, Nicole becomes a candidate for student body president.

programme.desc: 'S2/E31 - El Monsignor's Last Stand'. When Jed asks Crimson on a date, Alice is determined to stop it. She uses splinter magic to bring to life El Monsignor, Crimson's favourite romantic hero.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S2/E16'. Sam becomes a tutor. He also finds out the girl he's been chatting up is the beautiful girl dubbed The Unattainable.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S2/E41 - The Duck Knight Returns!'. When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E79 - Truth'. A friend of Marinette's gets akumatized into Truth. Using his power to force people to tell the truth, he wants to know Marinette's secret...and Ladybug and Cat Noir's, too!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E80 - Lies'. A friend of Adrien's get akumatized into Lies. Able to make liars disappear, she is determined to rid the world of lies and those who tell them...including superheroes!

programme.desc: 'S2/E45 - Trent Gets Schooled'. Trent demands Leo and Chase help him study for an important science test, so they use the opportunity as payback for his years of bullying and trick him into failing.

programme.desc: 'S1/E27 - Valentine's Dance, Green Streets'. At the Valentine's Dance, Cricket develops an unwanted crush on Gabriella! Cricket joins forces with Officer Keys to hunt down a neighborhood litterbug.

programme.desc: 'S1/E28 - Park Pandemonium, Cricket's Biscuits'. Gramma spurns Tilly, so Tilly tries making her jealous. Gramma makes biscuits for the kids when they're hurt, but not when they're better.

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Anne or Beast?, Best Fronds'. Sprig tries to take down a mysterious beast by himself to prove that he's responsible. Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.desc: 'S2/E46 - No Going Back'. Davenport is under attack from a hacker. Leo suspects his imprisoned brother and tries to prove it, putting their lives in danger. The Lab Rats' secret may soon be public knowledge.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E31 - Cricket's Kapowie!, Car Trouble'. Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee's new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E32 - Urban Legend, Wishing Well'. Gramma convinces the neighbours she's a witch, and Bill throws a barbeque. Cricket's scheme to cash in on a wishing well snares Tilly, leaving Cricket with a dilemma.

programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E83 - Psycomedian'. A famous comedian gets akumatized into Psycomedian. Able to impose any emotions on anyone, he wants to wipe the smiles off everyone's faces.

programme.desc: 'S5/E81 - Wrong Victor, the'. When Raven's father, Victor, has a health scare, Raven and Booker return to San Francisco to help. Booker fails to babysit his cousin and must fix things before Raven finds out.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S2/E21 - Spy Fly'. After failing to study for a big test Leo attempts to cheat using Davenport's Fly Spy device, a mobile robotic spy camera in the form of a fly.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S2/E22 - Missin' the Mission'. Feeling like the least exciting person in the house, Leo tries to prove his worth when he decides to help Davenport and the new, mobile, Eddy stop an underground gas leak.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - Race to Stink Island'. Ludo remembers he was filming on his phone the night he was shattered. Everyone races to the island to find the phone and the evidence on it. But betrayal and heartbreak also await.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Normal'. Tara has saved her family from extinction. Esmerelda is getting closer to working out the Supreme Everine's identity. Tara tries to throw her off the scent but it goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S2/E18'. Sam goes out on his first date with The Unattainable but they don't share the alchemy Sam is starting to experience with Rebecca.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S2/E19'. It's the first round of the talent show. Alex and Co do well but are criticized by a judge who secretly supports the other contender as he wrote their song.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - Little White Big Fat Lie'. Bella's determined to end Iggi's deception and uses splinter magic to make a 'truth ray'. But Bella hits Alice with the ray, just when she needs to pull off a lie she has told Jed.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S2/E35 - Showtime'. It's the opening night of the school play, but Bella has bigger worries - Iggi has discovered the last cryptstone and he's determined to raise it!

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. The principal is angry when he learns his daughter is wasting time with music, and stops her hanging out with Alex. A record producer has seen his video clip and likes it.

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S2/E22 - Leonina'. Disney Channel features classic cartoons and popular new animated characters, as well as live action sitcoms and an unrivaled range of classic Disney feature films.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S2/E36 - Vampire Luau'. Unaware that Davorin is free, Bella celebrates being accepted to fashion school and the gang arrange a party.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - Race to Stink Island'. Ludo remembers he was filming on his phone the night he was shattered. Everyone races to the island to find the phone and the evidence on it. But betrayal and heartbreak also await.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S2/E20'. Alex overhears a judge saying they need a new song to get through to the next round and becomes so obsessed with writing it that he neglects his homework.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S2/E21'. Alex is increasingly worried about his song for the next round. Is it better than the first, and will it be good enough for them to go through to the next round?

programme.title: Violetta
programme.desc: 'S2/E87'. Francesca finally tells Marco that she will go out with him. DJ confesses to Camila that he feels something for her, but she tells him that she was just using him to make Broadway jealous.

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Team Spirit'. Binny and Melchior meet the ghost soccer star Mats, who was involved in a betting scandal, which destroyed his reputation. Binny and Melchior decide to take the case...

programme.title: Rolling With The Ronks
programme.desc: 'S1/E28 - The Ronks Hit the Slopes'. The Ronks venture out on the mountain for a snow y adventure, but encounter Mormagnon, who claims that the mountain is his as he has found it first.

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S2/E35 - New Wartwood/Friend or Frobo'. Intent on winning over Wartwood, Marcy makes a plan to improve the town. Desperate for fun, Polly breaks out on her own and finds an unlikely new friend in the process.

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S2/E36 - Toad to Redemption/Maddie & Marcy'. Mayor Toadstool is offered his dream job but realizes he doesn't want to leave Wartwood. Maddie is working on an important spell, but her three sisters keep getting in the way.

programme.title: Descendants Wicked World
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - Odd Mal Out'. The AKs teach the VKs the history of Auradon's Jewel-bilee ceremony and the mystery surrounding the disappearance of Mal's family gem.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S2/E32 - What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!'. Della struggles for survival against dangerous elements of the Moon, as she looks for a way to get back to her family on Earth,

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - Friendship Hates Magic!'. Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - Treasure of the Found Lamp!'. The boys track a missing artefact across Duckburg, Scrooge and Webby stall a warrior looking for it with a phoney quest!

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S2/E35 - The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!'. In the old west, Scrooge and Goldie start a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from a corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Big Deal/Forbidden Feline'. Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Coffee Quest, Phoenix Rises'. There's a coffee shortage. Can Cricket get some? The Greens' dog Phoenix runs away. Can the family find her?

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Uncaged'. Nancy returns and Cricket and Tilly are pleased to see her, but Bill and Gramma are worried she'll be a bad influence on the kids.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Night Bill/Cheap Snake'. Cricket Green's family moves from the country to Big City. As they acclimatize, their perspectives on differences between country and city are revealed in an entertaining way.

programme.title: Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Sleepover Showdown'. At the girls' first sleepover, Violet tries to fit in with Maya and her new friends with a little help from her mask.

programme.desc: 'S2/E42 - Lily's Mom Has Got It Goin' On'. Lilly's mum has a date with Hannah's dad. The girls are determined the date will be a success but it doesn't go well after Lilly's mum insists on paying half.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E44 - I Will Always Loathe You'. Miley's in the running for an award so Grandma comes to stay. Aunt Dolly comes too and the two women don't get on. Rico has a great idea for a public access commercial.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E45 - The Way We Almost Weren't'. Miley's on tour but wants to rush home to see Maroon 5. Dad persuades her to stop at the diner where he met her mum, and lightning causes her to dream about the meeting.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S4/E79 - Saved by the Belle'. As part of his mission to win the superlative 'Freshest' four years in a row, Booker desperately needs to win the coveted Freshest Freshman to solidify his legend.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S4/E80 - So You Think You Can Drive?'. It's time for the kids to get their learner's permits and they ask Raven to teach them how to drive!

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: 'S7/E9'. Life after the 90 days continues. As the couples look back at their journey, the newlyweds realise that their lives have not become easier.

programme.title: Darcey & Stacey
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Tears And Tantrums'. Darcey makes a tough decision between love and logic. A doctor's appointment forces Stacey to face hard truths. Debbie and Reina have shocking news.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: 'S7/E9 - Pillow Talk: Episode 9'. Series favourites give their own juicy opinions on previous episodes' drama and best moments. From the comfort of their home, no one is holding back!

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Help From Above'. A broken pelvis means Erin is warned of the dangers of getting pregnant. So when she goes into labour she is fighting for a life that is not just her own.

programme.title: Unexpected: Teenage & Pregnant
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Missing Child'. Alex tells his grandmother that he plans to move out, Anthony starts to think more seriously about his and Rilah's relationship and the rehab centre has a bed for Max.

programme.title: Say Yes To The Dress
programme.desc: 'S12/E10 - When In Doubt, Customise'. Zabrina looks for an extravagant ball gown for her Near Year's Eve wedding, and Cheryl is nervous to try on her custom dress because she has never seen it!

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Torn'. Sumit reveals his truth, while Deavan discovers more troubling information about Jihoon's past. Corey's time is running out, and Liam gives Aladin an ultimatum.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
So Freakin Cheap
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Cheap Child O' Mine'. Brittney and Shelley make amends. Becky takes Jay on a date to make up for her cheapskate ways, and Angela finally gets fed up with Tony's cheapness.

programme.title: Doubling Down With The Derricos
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Unexpected Ultimatum'. The Derricos celebrate Darian's 15th birthday with a big surprise. Meanwhile, Karen's reluctance to hire a nanny frustrates both Deon and GG.

programme.title: Doubling Down With The Derricos
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Lit Christmas'. With Diez's surgery to reconstruct his skull approaching, Deon wants Christmas to be extra special this year. But an unexpected expense puts his plans in jeopardy.

programme.title: Doubling Down With The Derricos
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Hearts And Heads'. The Derricos head out for Diez's skull surgery, and a last-minute change to the hospital's COVID protocols leaves Deon in disbelief.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: 'S7/E9'. Life after the 90 days continues. As the couples look back at their journey, the newlyweds realise that their lives have not become easier.

programme.desc: 'S8/E25 - Home Runs and Rabbit Holes'. Buddy is at a school in New York City for an Alice In Wonderland-themed cake. Plus, top baseball player Carlos Beltran commissions a vintage-style cake.

programme.title: Kitchen Boss
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Take Out Made Fresh'. One of Buddy's favourite takeaways is Chinese, and today he shows you how to make it at home, including salt and pepper shrimp and fried rice Buddy-style!

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Trick Or Treat'. Abigail mistakes labour pains for constipation and gives birth to her surprise baby in a toilet. Plus, doctors misdiagnose Angel's baby bump as a tumour.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - The Incredible Bulk'. Ruben is a personal trainer whose head growth has prevented him from seeing clients. Kaitlin has blue marks and scars due to long-term drug use.

programme.title: Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - A Trich-y Situation'. Dr. Angie sees Holly, a patient with a deep, dark hair-related secret in need of help. Meanwhile, Dr. Meena fights to help Devin keep his extreme body hair.

programme.title: The Bad Skin Clinic
programme.desc: 'S2/E8'. For the last decade, Ryan has lived with a bright red face. Plus, James has unidentified lumps on his head, can Dr. Emma help solve these mysterious skin conditions?

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - My Thumb Is A Toe!'. A woman who walked on a broken leg for 10 years is Dr. Ebonie's most difficult surgery yet. Dr. Sarah shakes the hand of a man with a big toe for a thumb.

programme.desc: The FAITH Family believes that in times like these the local body needs a stronger voice than ever before. Join this partnership with New Life Church bringing you a NOW Word from the local Body.

programme.title: On The Living Edge With Mark Chironna
programme.desc: Dr Mark Chironna has been in the people-helping business for more than four decades. He is a passionate preacher of the Gospel of Christ. He holds advanced degrees in theology, semiotics and future leadership studies and psychology.

programme.title: The Miraculous With Wessel Du Bruyn
programme.desc: Follow Wessel du Bruyn Ministries on their travels around the world as they preach and teach the gospel of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Sparkling Gems With Rick Renner
programme.desc: Be inspired by the amazing cache of rich, enduring treasures mined from deep within the Word, unlocked by Rick Renner. This devotion is sure to inspire and provoke you to plunge deeper into God's Word.

programme.title: Billy Graham TV - Billy Graham...
programme.desc: 'Billy Graham TV - Billy Graham Ministries'. With the threat of violent persecution at the hands of those who hate Christ, Christians today must respond before it's too late. Be inspired by stories of those who suffered for faith.

programme.title: CHOOSE LIFE With John Roebert
programme.desc: Pastor John and Mandri Roebert lead Choose Life Church in Pretoria - a church with a passion for the Holy Spirit, worship and God's Word. Their motto: helping people know Jesus.

programme.title: Church Special: Divine Restoration...
programme.desc: 'Church Special: Divine Restoration Ministries'. The FAITH Family believes that in times like these the local body needs a stronger voice than ever before. Divine Restoration Ministries bringing you a word from the local body.

programme.title: Winning Walk With Ed Young Sr.
programme.desc: Ed Young presents God's love and truth in the most relevant ways. You'll find teaching that speaks directly to your needs in ways that are relevant, accessible and convenient.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin utilises powerful illustrations to tackle difficult topics with boldness to reach people with the pure message of the gospel of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Greg Laurie TV - The Harvest
programme.desc: Pastor and Evangelist Laurie teaches the simple yet life changing message of the gospel.

programme.title: Faith With Katie
programme.desc: Katie Souza is known for her insights relating to soul-healing. Once Katie began teaching and writing about the process of soul-healing, she witnessed and heard evidence of thousands of miracles worldwide.

programme.title: The Elena & Natalia Show
programme.desc: Twin TV hosts, Elena & Natalia Maranian, engage in heartfelt, transparent conversations about Jesus, life, and love centered on the beauty and truth of God's Word.

programme.title: Supernatural Fire
programme.desc: Supernatural Fire exists to train, develop and equip believers to become disciples of Christ, assisting them to reach their destiny by the leading of the Holy Spirit.

programme.title: Revival Is Here Again With...
programme.desc: 'Revival Is Here Again With Goodheart Obi Ekwueme'. With Prophetic fervour, join Apostle Goodheart as he makes a call for a Spiritual awakening and a return to God's original plan.

programme.title: Faith Life Church With Keith Moore
programme.desc: Keith Moore is the founder and president of Moore Life Ministries and Faith Life Church, Branson, Missouri and Sarasota, Florida. He places great emphasis on the importance of the written Word and the necessity of being led by the Spirit.

programme.title: Break Point
programme.desc: After navigating obstacles like failure, betrayal and abandonment Paul and Brenda share insight from mental health experts, overcoming stories and testimonies to build faith for the journey forward.

programme.title: Hour Of Salvation - David Ibiyeomie
programme.desc: David Ibiyeomie is the presiding Pastor of Salvation Ministries. Pastor to millions across the globe, he is also a teacher and writer with the sole aim of impacting lives.

programme.title: Rhema Praise
programme.desc: Featuring the all-encompassing ministry of God's Word through the preaching and teachings of Kenneth W Hagin.

programme.title: Next Level With Bolaji Idowu
programme.desc: Join bible teacher and pastor, Bolaji Idowu, as he pioneers thriving churches that bring hope and lead people to become fully devoted followers of Christ.

programme.title: Building People
programme.desc: Bishop EJ Moodley II pastors Bethsaida Ministries International, a dynamic multicultural church based in Phoenix Durban. Their focus is on spiritually equipping the body of Christ.

programme.title: Church Special: Moment Of Truth
programme.desc: The FAITH Family believes that in times like these the local body needs a stronger voice than ever before. Join this partnership with the Moment of Truth bringing you a NOW Word from the local Body.

programme.title: Faith Hill Church
programme.desc: Join Tafara and Chipo Butayi in their assignment to empower the body of Christ to live in the fullness of salvation. Through their shepherding, learn to receive the fullness of your salvation and walk in love, wellness and prosperity.

programme.title: The Fan

programme.title: Eliminators

programme.desc: A young man seeks vengence for the death of his teacher.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown

programme.title: Married To Medicine: Atlanta
programme.desc: 'S9/E15 - Divine Intervention'. Jackie's surprise open marriage discussion has some couples tongue-tied, but others lean in. Later that night, old tensions rise up as Heavenly and Contessa finally say what's on their minds.

programme.title: Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - Welcome Back To The Neighborhood'. When Dave decides to disconnect the Johnson home from the grid, he inadvertently causes a community-wide power outage, much to Calvin's frustration.

programme.desc: 'S1/E48'. The clever antelope and skunk are travelling through the country. They discover all sorts of interesting places and meet a lot of friends along the way.

programme.title: Trixi
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Trixi plays on the computer to learn more about wild animals and plants.

programme.title: Lappies
programme.desc: 'S1/E83'. Lappies the lion is the prince of the bushveld and heir to the throne because his dad is the king. Lappies learns, plays and experiences as many adventures everyday with his friends.

programme.title: Gomora
programme.desc: 'S2/E46'. The Molefe's and Dlamini's are at odds with one another in their shared grief. Zodwa is confronted with a new set of challenges in her blended family living arrangements.

programme.title: Gomora
programme.desc: 'S2/E47'. Zodwa and Sibongile are at odds after Sibongile steals from her. Teddy and Ntokozo come up with an idea to honour Langa. Thathi and Melusi struggle to find a compromise.

programme.title: Gomora
programme.desc: 'S2/E48'. Miss Hlungwani catches Zodwa and Don in a screaming match. Gladys steps in to play mediator between the Dlamini's and Molefe's.

programme.title: Gomora
programme.desc: 'S2/E49'. Langa is celebrated by his friends and family. Don gets a job offer.

programme.title: Gomora
programme.desc: 'S2/E50'. There's drama at Langa's funeral. Don is forced to go back to Bongani, hat in hand. Sibongile starts warming up to life in Gomora.

programme.title: Never Say Goodbye
programme.desc: A frustrated married man hires a hitman to murder his wife, but things take a different turn when she finds true love and companionship with the same professional killer.

programme.title: Nnake
programme.desc: Returning home from university, Lesego attends a street party with her sister. Koketso realises that the fun may have gone too far when she discovers that her sister is missing.

programme.title: Date My Family
programme.desc: 'S8/E5'. On this episode we are introduced to Harry a graphic designer from Pretoria. Harry is not one for crowds, and he is looking for a goal driven beautiful lady.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S2/E106 - Heartbreak Hotel'. Nomonde's world is in disarray and Cobra's rise threatens to awaken an old enemy.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S2/E107 - Warning Shots'. Nomonde lands in hot water and Lindiwe sets her snares.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S2/E108 - Last Days Of Love'. Lindani is forced to face the reality of his situation, while Paulina realises the kind of world she has gotten herself into.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S2/E109 - Out With The Old'. Cobra is seduced by the promise of a new life and Nomonde takes bold new steps for Khanyisa Diamonds.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S2/E110 - Goodness, Mercy & Gail'. An experienced criminal takes an interest in Cobra's business ventures. Detective Tshabalala has an unpleasant surprise for Zweli.

programme.title: VIP Invite
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Jehovah Rapha Our Healer'. Hle hosts Psalmist Takie Ndou who has come through to declare that anything is possible with God, and that victory belongs to Jesus.

programme.title: Our Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: 'S10/E17'. Trends come and go but a great wedding decoration will always make the wedding photos relevant and beautiful. On this episode of OPW, we take a look at the top 10 wedding decor.

programme.title: Ngi Shade Wrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Lesego is wearing her new lover's engagement ring, but there is a hurdle, she needs to divorce Lesedi first. Lesedi is currently dating and has a child with her former best friend and maid of honour.

programme.title: eBukhosini
programme.desc: A woman accusing her mechanic of fraudulent behaviour, and a father demanding damage money for his pregnant daughter. Ndabezitha Mahlangu mediates.

programme.title: Umkhokha
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Nobuntu and Reggie get closer, but they are being watched. Sphamandla finally confronts the person who wants him dead, and MaMzobe does the unthinkable to tarnish Sphamandla's name.
